Niu Xinyi
牛心意

电影制作硕士，专注短视频与短片全流程创作。擅长视觉叙事设计、时尚造型策划，以影像捕捉情感，以光影构建世界。

MFA in Film Production. Specializing in short film and short video, from script to screen. Creating visual worlds through light, composition, and story.

Portfolio — 01

短片

Short Film
01

2026 · Short Film · 10min

我妈妈是公主

My Mother Is a Princess

导演 · 编剧 · 摄影 / Director · Screenwriter · DP

为母复仇的黑色童话，聚焦儿童心理成长。以童话外壳包裹现实创伤，探讨亲子关系与内心修复的深层命题。

A dark fairy tale of vengeance and childhood trauma. Wrapped in the form of a bedtime story, the film explores the fractured bond between mother and child, and the long road to inner healing.

上海市大学生创意成果展 三等奖 · Shanghai Student Creative Works Exhibition — 3rd Prize

Storyboard · 分镜头脚本

02

2023 · Short Film · Suspense

笔帽

The Pen Cap

执行美术 · 造型 / Art Director · Costume Stylist

悬疑短片，以细腻的美术与造型语言强化心理张力与氛围感。

A psychological suspense short. Refined art direction and costume design heighten the film's sense of unease and tension throughout.

谢晋杯 最佳美术奖 · Xie Jin Cup — Best Art Direction

Portfolio — 02

视觉短片

Visuals — Short Video & Music Visual

新歌预测视觉概念 — REDRED

New Release Visual Concept — REDRED

围绕歌曲情绪进行视觉转译，通过节奏变化与画面设计增强内容感染力。

A visual translation of the song's emotional arc, using rhythm and image design to amplify its impact.

音乐情绪沉浸 1 — Take Me By The Hand

Music Immersion 1 — Take Me By The Hand

通过超现实视觉构建人与音乐的互动关系，强化情绪沉浸体验。

Surreal visuals build an immersive bond between body and sound, deepening the emotional experience.

音乐情绪沉浸 2 — cool with you

Music Immersion 2 — cool with you

通过人物复制与空间错位，表现与自我共处的状态。

Doubling of the self and spatial displacement — a meditation on being alone with who you are.

2025

Levi's

Levi's Campaign Shoot

平面拍摄 · 造型助理 / Styling Assistant

参与主题策划和现场执行，协助完成 Levi's 品牌平面拍摄造型工作。

2022

MAKE UP FOR EVER

浮生若梦 · Float Like a Dream

彩绘助理 · 模特 · 优秀作品 / Body Paint Assistant · Model · Featured Work

超现实材质探索妆容。以身体为画布，探索妆彩与材质边界，入选优秀作品展示。

Surrealist material exploration in body paint. The skin as canvas — pushing the limits of texture, pigment, and form. Selected as a featured work.
